parameters.name: multiplelinestrips
parameters.label: Multiple Line Strips
parameters.description: Allows the creation of multiple line strips, adding a line break toggle per point.

parameters.name: interpmethodpersegment
parameters.label: Interpolation Method per Segment
parameters.description: When toggle is on, it uses a separate interpolation method for each segment in the input line strips.

parameters.name: interpmethod
parameters.label: Interpolation Method
parameters.description: Method to use for interpolation.

parameters.name: tension
parameters.label: Tension
parameters.description: Controls how tightly the cardinal line strip bends through the control points

parameters.name: enableweights
parameters.label: Enable Weights
parameters.description: Enable specifying control points weigths

parameters.name: enabletangent
parameters.label: Enable Tangents
parameters.description: Enable specifying control points tangents

parameters.name: enablepointrepeat
parameters.label: Enable Point Repeat
parameters.description: Enable specifying repeated control points for B-Splines

parameters.name: closed
parameters.label: Closed
parameters.description: The last vertex is connected to the first vertex.

parameters.name: premultcolor
parameters.label: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.description: Enable RGB values pre-multiplication with the Alpha.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Choose to create a predefined attribute or a custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0customname
parameters.label: Custom Name
parameters.description: The name of the new cutom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the type.

parameters.name: attr0numcomps
parameters.label: Number of Components
parameters.description: Number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Whether to output the control points or the subdivided line(s)

parameters.name: divmethod
parameters.label: Divisions Method
parameters.description: The method to apply the divisions.

parameters.name: divs
parameters.label: Divisions
parameters.description: The number of divisions.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.label: Distance
parameters.description: Distance between points when post-resampling by distance.

parameters.name: addctrlpointattr
parameters.label: Add ControlPoint Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to the output control points with attributes or subdivided line strips.

parameters.name: resamplemethod
parameters.label: Post-Resample Method
parameters.description: Resampling method used after division.

parameters.name: resampledivs
parameters.label: Divisions
parameters.description: The number of divisions.

parameters.name: resampledist
parameters.label: Distance
parameters.description: Sets the maximum distance when resampling by distance between points

parameters.name: indvarattr
parameters.label: Independant Variable Attribute
parameters.description: Attribute to use as the independent variable.

parameters.name: indvarstep
parameters.label: Independant Variable Step
parameters.description: Step size to use for the independent variable, usually a fraction of the independent variable range.

parameters.name: resamplemaxverts
parameters.label: Maximum Number of Vertices
parameters.description: Sets the number of vertices to be allocated. It should be bigger than the actual number of vertices created (visible in info popup). More vertices allocated use more memory.

parameters.name: maxtries
parameters.label: Max Tries for Binary Search
parameters.description: Max number of iterations for binary search when linearly resampling.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: attr0value3
parameters.label: Attr0Value3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
